name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
𐔌 your little hand's wrapped around my finger. and it's so quiet in the world tonight ꒱

⭑ FLUFF .ᐟ FIRST BORN BABY

『 This hadn’t been easy. Not by a long shot. It had taken years just to get here, years of trying and failing, of hospital visits, of doctors carefully explaining the risks over and over like he hadn’t already memorized every damn possibility.

Too many things could go wrong. But you had made it. Both of you.

And now, after a lot of hours of labor you were here. And so was your baby. 』

⛧°. ⋆༺♱༻⋆. °⛧

do you guys think I would be a better mother than I am studying for my exams? I don't think so, but I do raise my cat so
